key_events: KOSPI index jumped 8.4% to 5,478.70, spurred by optimism regarding Iran war de-escalation.
Global oil prices fell below $100 per barrel, contributing to market recovery.
Affinity Equity Partners abandoned challenge to Lotte Rental acquisition; strategy shifted to selling SK Rent-a-Car.
Bank of Korea and Bank Indonesia launched cross-border QR payment system to boost trade and inclusive growth.
March exports surged 48.3% to a record $86 billion; semiconductor shipments exceeded $30 billion.

upcoming_events.description: BEXCO Exhibition Center 1, Busan. 136 galleries showcasing 4,000 artworks under the theme 'NODE: A Knot of Connection and Expansion'.
COEX Hall C&D, Seoul. Featuring 169 galleries, the largest edition to date.

upcoming_events.event: APMA, Chapter Five – From the APMA Collection
upcoming_events.description: Amorepacific Museum of Art exhibition featuring works by David Hockney, Nam June Paik, and Lee Bul.

art.policy: April is officially recognized as 'Science Month' in South Korea.
